ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-11-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar May-04-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: K. Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Sydney E. Fairbairn, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Old Republic Insurance Company, Assignee of World Savings Bank, FSB.
No appearance by defendant Alfredo Slazar or Maria E. Salazar.
Defaults were entered against defendants on September 19, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed on September 29, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Old Republic Insurance Company, Assignee of World Savings Bank, FSB, and against the Defaulted Defendants Alfredo Salazar and Maria E. Salazar as follows:

Damages/Principal - $78,348.45.
Prejudgment Interest - $5,957.00.
Attorney's Fees - $3,000.00.
Costs - $485.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $87,790.45.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Apr-20-2010 Continued To May-04-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Sydney E. Fairbairn, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Old Republic Insurance Company, Assignee of World Savings Bank, FSB.
No appearance by defendants Alfredo Salazar or Maria E. Salazar.
Defaults were entered against defendants on September 29, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed on September 29, 2009.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed today, April 20, 2010.

The Court requires additional documentation from plaintiff in order to proceed with today's default prove-up hearing. Good cause appearing, this matter is CONTINUED to May 4, 2010 @ 9:00 a.m. in Department 218.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-22-2010 Continued To May-24-10 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. appearing specially for the plaintiff. The OSC is re-set for 5/24/2010 at 1:30 PM in Department 212. Proceedings not reported. (212)
